Introduction.title: Spread your dreams of studying abroad with HCM Mirai
Introduction.subtitle: Who We Are
Introduction.whyChooseUs: Why Should You Choose HCM Mirai?
Introduction.mission: HCM Mirai Study Abroad, along with a leading network of educational partners, is one of the reputable and long-standing consulting and training units in Vietnam. With the mission of "Dedication - Professionalism - Transparency", we have been the bridge helping thousands of students conquer international knowledge.
Introduction.desc1: We are not just a consulting center, but also a reliable companion, helping you prepare all necessary baggage from language, life skills to complex legal procedures.
Introduction.desc2: With 19 years of training experience and a network of over 200 partner universities in Japan, Korea, Australia, we are committed to bringing the safest and most effective learning path.

document_service.description: Full package translation, notarization, and paperwork service to save time for your family.

career_path.description: Ensuring a future after graduation with job opportunities both abroad and in Vietnam.

info.address_val: 152 Ngo Gia Tu Street, Le Loi, Vinh Hưng, Nghệ An, Vietnam

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent successfully! We will contact you back as soon as possible.

a.title: A. Purpose and scope of collection
content: To use certain services on the website https://hcm-mirai.com, you may be required to register personal information (member) with us, including: Email, Full name, Contact phone number, address.

We also collect information about the number of visits, including the number of pages you view, the number of links you click, other information related to the connection to the website and information that the Web browser you use every time you access our website including: IP address, Browser type, language used, time and addresses that Browser accesses.

b.title: B. Scope of information use
content: The purpose of using the information Member provided to:
Supporting customers when purchasing products
Answering customer questions

Providing customers with the latest information on our Website, conducting customer surveys, promotional activities related to the products and services of the website if you register to receive email notifications.

c.title: C. Information storage time
c.content: Member's personal data will be stored until there is a request for cancellation or the Member logs in and cancels it. Otherwise, in all cases, Member's personal information will be secured on the server of https://hcm-mirai.com

d.title: D. Address of the unit collecting and managing personal information
d.content: Address: 152 Ngo Gia Tu St, Le Loi, Vinh, Nghe An

e.title: E. Means and tools for users to access and edit their personal data
content: Members have the right to check, update, adjust or cancel their personal information by logging into their account and editing personal information or requesting https://hcm-mirai.com to do this.

Members have the right to send complaints about the seller to the Administrator of https://hcm-mirai.com at: contact@hcm-mirai.com. When receiving these feedbacks, we will re-confirm the information, in case it is as reflected by the Member, depending on the level, there will be timely processing measures.

f.title: F. Commitment to confidentiality of customer personal information
content: Personal information of Members on https://hcm-mirai.com is committed to absolute confidentiality according to the personal information protection policy of the website. The collection and use of each Member's information is only performed with the consent of that customer unless otherwise provided by law.
Do not use, transfer, provide or disclose to any 3rd party about the Member's personal information without the consent of the Member.

In case the information storage server is attacked by a hacker resulting in the loss of Member's personal data, https://hcm-mirai.com will be responsible for reporting the incident to the investigating authorities for timely processing and notifying the Member.
Absolutely secure all online transaction information of the Member including invoice information, accounting documents, digitized at level 1 secure central data area of https://hcm-mirai.com.

We require individuals when registering/purchasing as Members, to provide full personal information such as: full name, contact address, email, phone, etc., and take responsibility for the legality of the above information. The administration of https://hcm-mirai.com is not responsible for nor resolves any complaints related to the interests of that Member if it is found that all the personal information of that Member provided at the initial registration is incorrect.

The Administration recommends that Members should secure information related to their access password and should not share it with any other person. If using a shared computer, Members should log out, or exit all opening Website windows.

TermsOfService.title: TERMS OF SERVICE
TermsOfService.intro: Please read these Terms & Conditions carefully before registering, accessing and using the Service on Website hcm-mirai.com of HCM Mirai. By using our Service, you have accepted these Terms of Use and agree to be bound by the provisions on using the Service on Website hcm-mirai.com. If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us via email: contact@hcm-mirai.com for further details.

1.title: ARTICLE 1. SUBJECT AND SCOPE OF APPLICATION.
content: This agreement applies to all individuals and organizations accessing and/or using the network with the domain name hcm-mirai.com, services, networks arising from this domain name; websites and applications owned by HCM Mirai.

This agreement applies to all acts arising from the use, access, search, sharing, provision, etc. of contents, products, information, resources arising from the network with the domain name hcm-mirai.com, services, networks arising from this domain name; websites and applications owned by HCM Mirai.

2.title: ARTICLE 2. DEFINITIONS.
content: Terms of Use means the entire content of this document and its attachments.

Website is a general name for all the following objects: website with domain name hcm-mirai.com, services, websites arising from this domain name; and websites and applications running on other platforms owned by HCM Mirai.
Users (including candidates and partners) are any individuals or organizations using the Website.

User Content is all information, data, text, software, music, sound, photos, graphics, video, advertisements, messages or other materials sent, posted or displayed by the User on the Website or User through HCM Mirai to display on the Website.
Service is all products that HCM Mirai provides within its business scope by providing directly to consumers or providing indirectly through the Website.
User Account is a set including 01 (one) Username corresponding to 01 (one) Password that the User uses to log into the Website to use the Website and use the Service.

3.title: ARTICLE 3. INFORMATION AUTHENTICATION AND REGISTRATION FOR USE.
3.content: To use the Service, User agrees to fully perform the steps and regulations that we require when registering for a User Account and/or registering to use the Service, including but not limited to entering information as requested by us and our authentication of registration information,...

4.title: ARTICLE 4. ACCOUNT AND PASSWORD.
content: To use the Service on the Website, Users must register an account, initialize a password and authenticate the User's phone number. User is obligated to manage and secure the User Account.

In case we have reason to conclude that User Content posted by User Account is untrue, does not comply with the terms of use of the Website and/or the agreements of these Terms of Use, We have the right to request the User to change the password or We have the right to temporarily suspend the User's account until the violations are resolved and corrected.

In case the User loses the Password or uses the terms of use of the Website incorrectly, or uses the agreements of these Terms of Use incorrectly causing damage, the User shall bear all damages occurring to the Damaged Party. We are not responsible for compensating for these damages.

5.title: ARTICLE 5. AGREEMENT ON INFORMATION
content: User acknowledges that we have the right to collect and use information to serve the provision of Services: Personal information, Partner information, General information...
User commits not to post content that is violent, unsafe, offensive, untrue, infringing intellectual property or malicious code.

6.title: ARTICLE 6. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY AGREEMENT
6.content: User commits that all User Content posting acts do not infringe the rights of any third party. HCM Mirai holds all intellectual property rights to the resources on the Website.

7.title: ARTICLE 7. ADVERTISING AGREEMENT
7.content: By using the Website and Services, User agrees that We have the right to send promotional information about the Service through email, text message or call.

8.title: ARTICLE 8. SANCTION STATEMENT
8.content: We have the right to temporarily lock User Accounts or stop displaying User Content if there are signs of law violation or causing damage to the Website system.

9.title: ARTICLE 9. EFFECT OF TERMS OF USE
9.content: The Terms of Use take effect when you register an account or use the Service. We have the right to update these Terms and will notify the User.

intro.title: Master Languages - Discover the World
intro.desc: At HCM Mirai, we don't just teach languages; we equip you with local culture and etiquette. With native teachers and specialized curriculum, we ensure the most effective learning path.

japanese.subtitle: From N5 to N1

features.native_desc: Learn directly with native teachers to standardize pronunciation and natural communication reflexes.
features.curriculum_desc: Exclusive curriculum structured closely around the latest JLPT and TOPIK exam formats.
features.facilities_desc: Modern Lab systems, projectors, and online learning support software.
features.support_desc: Teaching assistants help with review outside of class hours and answer questions 24/7.

method.desc: We create a pressure-free learning environment that stimulates the thinking and creativity of each student. At HCM Mirai, every lesson is an exciting cultural experience.
method.quote: Language is the roadmap of a culture.

school_1.name: Yonsei University

school_2.description: The most prestigious university in South Korea, a symbol of Korean education.

school_3.name: The University of Tokyo (UTokyo)
school_3.description: A leading research university in Asia and the world.

t1.name: Pham Thu Thao
t1.feedback: I'm so grateful to HCM Mirai for accompanying me throughout the application process. Thanks to the dedicated and close advice from the team, I obtained my visa and I'm having wonderful experiences in Korea.

t2.name: Nguyen Minh Anh
t2.feedback: The learning environment at HCM Mirai is very dynamic and professional. The teachers are dedicated to guiding me every step of the way, helping me quickly adapt to Japanese culture.

t3.name: Le Hoang Nam
t3.feedback: The labor export application process at the center is very transparent and fast. I got a stable job with an attractive salary after only 4 months of training.

empty.no_query: Please enter a keyword to search

hero.description: With over 10 years of experience in study abroad consulting, HCM-Mirai proudly provides optimal learning pathways, cost savings, and opportunities to receive scholarships from prestigious universities in Korea & Japan.

d41.title: Self-Funded Korean Study Abroad Program (D4-1 Visa)
d41.desc: Suitable for students who want to go to Korea to learn the language and experience the culture before majoring in a specific field.

d26.title: 1-Year Exchange Study (D2-6 Visa)
d26.desc: Opportunity to study and experience 1 year at prestigious universities in Korea through student exchange programs.

d2.title: College / University Degree Study (D2 Visa)
d2.desc: For high school graduates or students who want to study specialized majors at colleges and universities in Korea.

d24.title: Self-Funded Master’s Degree Study (D2-4 Visa)
d24.desc: Intensive training program for those who have graduated from university and wish to continue to pursue a Master’s degree.

phd.title: Master’s - PhD Study Abroad
phd.desc: Support with preparing scholarship applications and gaining admission to top research institutes and universities in Korea.

teachers.title: Teaching Staff
teachers.desc: A team of experienced, dedicated native and Vietnamese teachers with high expertise in teaching Korean.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.desc: Fully equipped with modern teaching equipment, comfortable classroom space, giving maximum support for knowledge acquisition.

comm.title: Communicative Korean Training Course
comm.desc: Focuses on developing listening and speaking skills, training natural communication reflexes with native speakers.

mid.title: Intermediate Korean Course
mid.desc: Helps students master intensive grammar and vocabulary to quickly prepare for proficiency exams or study abroad.

topik.title: TOPIK - KLT Training
topik.desc: TOPIK, EPS-TOPIK certification preparation with a curriculum closely following actual exams, guaranteed output.

topikAdv.title: Advanced TOPIK Course
topikAdv.desc: Special course for students who want to achieve TOPIK 4-6 in a short time to apply for university scholarships.

prep.title: Preparation Guide
prep.desc: Detailed instructions on essential items, how to pack luggage, as well as lifestyle and cultural aspects to note when going abroad.

dorm.title: Dormitory
dorm.desc: Support students in registering for the university’s dormitory with reasonable costs, ensuring security and convenience for studying.

airport.title: Airport Transfer
airport.desc: Door-to-door pick-up service when departing and pick-up support at the destination airport so students do not feel overwhelmed.

legal.title: Legal Procedures Support
legal.desc: Accompanying you in making Alien Registration Cards, opening bank accounts, and other necessary procedures.

job.title: Part-time Job Hunting
job.desc: Connecting and introducing part-time jobs suitable for language competency to increase income and practical experience.

rent.title: Housing / Accommodation
rent.desc: Introducing rental rooms (Goshiwon, One-room) near the university with good security for students not staying in the Dormitory.

whyChooseUs.label: HIGHLIGHTS
whyChooseUs.title: Why should you choose HCM-Mirai for your study abroad journey?

reason1.title: Optimal study pathway consultation
reason1.desc: Help you choose the school and major suitable for your capabilities, finances, and future orientation.

reason2.title: High Visa success rate
reason2.desc: 100% support for application preparation, thorough interview training, visa pass rate up to 99%.

reason3.title: Comprehensive and continuous support
reason3.desc: Accompany students from application preparation until they go to Korea and upon graduation.

reason4.title: Transparent and saving costs
reason4.desc: Commit to strictly zero hidden costs, always optimizing all expenses to save the most for the family.
